nasb.text: He answered them, “I told you already and you did not listen; why do you want to hear it again? You do not want to become His disciples too, do you?”

esv.text: He answered them, “I have told you already, and you would not listen. Why do you want to hear it again? Do you also want to become his disciples?”

cnv.text: 他回答：“我已經告訴你們，但是你們不聽；為甚麼現在又想聽呢？你們也想成為他的門徒嗎？”

ccb.text: 他回答说：“我已经告诉过你们了，你们不听，现在又问，难道你们也想做祂的门徒吗？”

csbs.text: 他回答：“我已经告诉过你们，你们不听，为什么现在又想听呢？难道你们也想成为他的门徒吗？”
